mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dms_work_order_log ( order_id, order_no, from_status, to_status, action, operator_id, operator_name, remark, create_time ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{action}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{remark}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: SELECT log_id AS logId, order_id AS orderId, order_no AS orderNo, from_status AS fromStatus, to_status AS toStatus, action, operator_id AS operatorId, operator_name AS operatorName, remark, create_time AS createTime FROM dms_work_order_log WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
